description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the alpine Docker image and runs a pages job in the default stage. The pages job should execute `apk update && apk add doxygen`, then `doxygen doxygen/Doxyfile`, then `mv doxygen/documentation/html/ public/`. It must publish the `public/` directory as a GitLab Pages artifact. The job should be limited to runners with the docker tag.
